title: Intel471 V2
description: The Intel471 V2 connector ingests STIX 2.1 objects from Intel 471's Titan cybercrime intelligence platform into OpenCTI. Version 2 introduces a Reports stream (replacing IOCs) and several enhancements over V1. It runs four configurable streams: malware indicators, YARA rules, reports (breach alerts, spot reports, malware reports), and CVE vulnerabilities. Each stream produces structured STIX objects with relationships linking indicators, observables, and reports.
short_description: Imports malware indicators, YARA rules, threat reports, and CVE vulnerabilities from Intel 471's Titan platform into OpenCTI via four configurable streams.
